pages.text:
MINISTER FOR FOREIGN AFFAIRS

NUKU'ALOFA

KINGDOM OF TONGA

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

WHEREAS the Convention relating to International Exhibitions was done at Paris on 22 November 1928,

WHEREAS the Convention was amended and supplemented by the Protocols of 10

May 1948, 16 November 1966, 30 November 1972, the Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31 May 1988,

AND WHEREAS Article 3 of the 1972 Protocol provides to the effect that the

Protocol shall remain open for accession by Government Parties to the 1928

Convention after 29 November 1973,

NOW THEREFORE, the Government of the Kingdom of Tonga hereby accedes to the 1928 Convention and the 1972 Protocol, including the Amendments of 24

June 1982 and 31 May 1988, and undertakes faithfully to fulfil and carry out all the provisions therein contained,

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I, Sonatane Tu'akinamolahi Taumoepeau Tupou, Minister for Foreign Affairs, have hereunto set my hand and affixed my seal.

Done at Nuku'alofa on this Fifteenth Day of November, Two Thousand and Seven.

ot

Minister for Foreign Affairs

TEL: 23-600

FAX: 23-360
